prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is EMT bending & installation, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: unreamed cut ends. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill).
title: Identification: EMT bending & installation (commercial project)
